indications.text:
Reconstituted Imagent
(cid:1)
(Perflexane Lipid Microspheres) Injectable Suspension is indicated
for use in subjects with suboptimal echocardiograms to opacify the left ventricular chamber
and to improve the delineation of the left ventricular endocardial border.
